title: Cant find the Amazon Dub Trailer for Thrice Upon a Time
display_title: Cant find the Amazon Dub Trailer for Thrice Upon a Time
wikitext:
[]: Can't find the Amazon Dub Trailer for Thrice Upon a Time             Quote Post by mastafishere » Mon Oct 24, 2022 10:30 pm There was a trailer for Thrice that was released I think a day or two before the movie came out that highlighted a lot of different dubs for the movie. It had Spike Spencer saying "Why is everyone so nice to me?" near the end, representing the English dub. For some reason, I can't seem to find that trailer anywhere. Anybody know where to find it? Any help would be most appreciated and I thank you advance (and I'll thank you again when you find it!)!
